ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from manually changing the Opportunity Owner. Owner changes are managed in OP4I and synced via Boomi. See BIZ-82919.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(OwnerId), NOT(OR( $Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $User.Alias = "boomi", $Profile.Name = "Integration User" )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity Owner cannot be changed manually. For OP4I deals, update the Deal Owner in OP4I. For SFDC deals, the Owner is automatically managed based on the Account Owner.
